# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent memcached exposed port.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-app
        image: your-web-app-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: CACHE_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001
        command: ["memcached", "-m", "64", "-u", "1001"]

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: background-worker
        image: your-background-worker-image:latest
        env:
        - name: CACHE_HOST
          value: "memcached-service"
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  selector:
    app: memcached
  # NetworkPolicy can be added here to restrict access to memcached-service
  # to only specific pods if needed.
